ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., sales, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the customer */,
  "customer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer type */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the customer */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Company size of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_customer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_type_id") REFERENCES customer_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_year" INTEGER /* Year the sale was made */,
  "sale_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the sale */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "freight" TEXT /* Freight cost for the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "sale_channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel used */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., online, offline, referral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer type (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_name" TEXT /* Name of the discount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freights" (
  "freight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freight */,
  "freight_name" TEXT /* Name of the freight */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the freight */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the freight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commissions" (
  "commission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commission */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who earned the commission */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale that earned the commission */,
  "commission_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the commission */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date the commission was earned */,
  "commission_status" TEXT /* Status of the commission (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commissions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commissions_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being measured */,
  "sale_year" INTEGER /* Year the performance is being measured */,
  "sales_target" TEXT /* Sales target for the employee */,
  "actual_sales" TEXT /* Actual sales made by the employee */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric (e.g., on-target, off-target) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the dashboard belongs to */,
  "sale_year" INTEGER /* Year the dashboard is for */,
  "kpi_name" TEXT /* Name of the KPI being tracked */,
  "kpi_value" TEXT /* Value of the KPI */,
  "dashboard_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was updated */,
  "dashboard_status" TEXT /* Status of the dashboard (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity being logged (e.g., login, sale, update) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit log (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sales" (
  "product_sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale the product was sold in */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sales_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer interacted with */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who interacted with the customer */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email, meeting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer note */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the note is about */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who wrote the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was written */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_notes_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_notes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
